---
# ======================================================================
# JACR Online Appendix Template
# ======================================================================
# JACR does not print appendices. Material that is needed for deeper
# understanding or replication, but that would interrupt the main thrust of
# the article, belongs here in a separate "online Appendix" file. Keep the
# online appendix under 10 megabytes (it may include small audio or visual
# files). Submit it as a separate file, not as part of the main manuscript.
# ======================================================================

title: "Online Appendix"
jacr-mode: manuscript

format:
  jacrquarto-docx: default
  jacrquarto-pdf: default

bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

# Appendix A: Study Stimuli {.appendix}

This appendix presents the stimuli and medical scenarios used in study 1.
Participants read the following scenario before answering the dependent
measures.

# Appendix B: Full Regression Tables {.appendix}

Detailed model output and robustness checks that support, but are not
essential to, the claims in the main text.
